nodes.label: AI as creative brainstorming partner
nodes.grounding_span: I use ai mostly for thinking through designs

nodes.label: AI for ideation vs. hands-on creation
nodes.label_negative: AI for actual pixel art creation
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do the actual creation of the art myself and to only use ai as a brainstorming partner

nodes.label: AI novelty and diversity of suggestions
nodes.label_negative: AI repetitiveness and lack of novelty
nodes.grounding_span: It has a tendency to suggest the same specific modifications over and over

nodes.label: AI integration with visual input
nodes.grounding_span: I like the models where you can upload images

nodes.label: Human artistic vision as essential driver
nodes.grounding_span: it would still need a human component to drive it to make better art with an artists eye

nodes.label: Creative inspiration and novel ideas
nodes.grounding_span: helped me come up with a more cohesive design that hadn't actually occurred to me on my own

nodes.label: Artistic craft and personal skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do the actual creation of the art myself

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity in design process
nodes.grounding_span: I might even come back after I've started a design

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as creative consultant
Frustration with AI repetitiveness
nodes.grounding_span: pretty repetitive suggestions from ai that do get frustrating

nodes.label: Concern about AI automation in art
nodes.grounding_span: it does worry me some, so many things can be automated with ai

nodes.label: Hope for improved AI diversity
nodes.grounding_span: I'd like to see ai get a bit less repetitive

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth refinement
nodes.grounding_span: definitely back and forth. I might even come back after I've started a design

nodes.label: Visual-contextual thinking
nodes.grounding_span: I like the models where you can upload images so I don't have to describe in detail
